reviews.comment:
Este lugar es re grande todo lo verde que tiene los turistas lo usan mucho además en invierno es usado por e público para tomar café o comer con una linda vista

(Translated by Google)
This place is really big, all the greenery is popular with tourists, and in winter it's a popular spot for people to have coffee or eat with a lovely view.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful wooded area. Clean. Good and varied options for dining and continuing your journey. Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
pedimos dos sandwich de milanesas en Full, según la foto venia con lechuga y tomate (1800$ c/u) nos la  entregan envueltas, nos sentamos (mesas sucias llenas de moscas) abrimos el envoltorio y estaban secas sin la ensalada, reclamo y me dicen (de mala onda) que tenia que haberla pedido con ensalada y me muestran un mini cartel en un costado que dice que hay que pedirla, si esta en la foto la tienen que entregar con ensalada, el que no la quiere que la saque o que pregunten, no se entiende, me la dieron de remala gana y siempre repitiendo que la tenia que haber pedido.

(Translated by Google)
We ordered two Milanese sandwiches at Full, according to the photo it came with lettuce and tomato ($1800 each) they gave it to us wrapped, we sat down (dirty tables full of flies) we opened the wrapper and they were dry without the salad, I complained and they told me (in a bad way) that I should have ordered it with salad and they showed me a mini sign on the side that says that you have to order it, if it is in the photo it has to be delivered with salad, whoever doesn't want it should take it out or ask, it is not understood, they gave it to me reluctantly and always repeating that I should have ordered it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoamIzemtBRRAB
